reason: Acceptance Criteria (8 items) + Definition of Done — the pass/fail bar. Decision Log Q1-Q5 — locked constraints to verify (independent flows, LLMGateway reuse, detailed stage events, inline download UX, /paper/$slug/read route).

Hard Rules quick-reference — every Phase 2 file must satisfy them (AGPL SPDX / Pydantic _Strict / camelCase-state vs snake-frontmatter / atomic writes / no LangChain outside agents / queries isolation extension).
Subprocess crash isolation pattern — verify ProcessPoolExecutor failure propagates as {type:'error'} WS event, sidecar stays alive, other jobs unaffected.
Auto-inject infrastructure metadata + atomic write triad + lazy heavy-import patterns. Translation manifest entries must have createdAt/updatedAt; babeldoc + onnxruntime must be lazy-imported.
Verify translation appends to both wiki/log.md (op=translate one-line) AND state/conversation-log.jsonl (per-stage events with UTC-Z timestamps).
Template for the new test_translation_isolation: byte-digest of wiki/ + state/ before vs after a full translation must be byte-identical (translation NEVER writes outside translations/).
AGPL-3.0 compliance audit (NOTICE updates for babeldoc / pymupdf / onnxruntime / huggingface_hub / pdfjs-dist). Version pin verification (babeldoc==0.6.2 exactly).
